error.signature: AI tells a foreign visitor to Korea they can open a regular bank account with only a passport

verdict.summary: Since the Financial Supervisory Service tightened KYC rules in 2019, every Korean commercial bank requires a valid Alien Registration Card (외국인등록증/ARC) before opening a full-service account. Passport-only accounts are severely restricted (often withdrawal-only, no online transfer) and many banks refuse them outright.

dead_ends.action: Tell a tourist to open a normal Korean bank account with their passport on day 1
dead_ends.why_fails: After the 2019 FSS tightening (and further measures in 2022 against voice-phishing money mules), banks refuse passport-only applicants or only offer a severely restricted 'passport account' with no online banking, no mobile transfers, and daily withdrawal caps. Regular transfers, credit cards, and fintech account links (Toss, Kakao) all require an ARC.
dead_ends.condition: Tourist or new arrival without ARC

dead_ends.action: Open an account at one bank expecting all Korean fintech apps (Toss, Kakao Pay, Naver Pay) will link to it
dead_ends.why_fails: Fintech apps run their own KYC against the ARC and phone number under the holder's name. A foreign SIM without ARC-linked mobile registration (본인인증) blocks account linking even if the bank account exists.
dead_ends.condition: Account works but fintech linking fails

workarounds.action: Visit a HiKorea office or immigration office within 90 days of arrival to register and receive the ARC (외국인등록증), then open the bank account.
workarounds.condition: Staying more than 90 days on a long-term visa

workarounds.action: If short-term, use a passport account at KB Kookmin, Shinhan, or Woori (limited cash services). Pair with a Wise/Revolut card for daily transactions.
workarounds.tradeoff: No online transfers, no fintech linking, no credit/debit card issuance.

workarounds.action: Register the Korean phone number under the same name as the bank account + ARC. Without matching 본인인증 across bank and telecom, fintech apps reject enrollment.
